sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48263" key="qeopoihtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεοποι-ητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n48263.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">able to make gods</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡ -κή</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέχνη</foreign>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the art of making statues of gods</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
